title: api.rs: get_vapid_public_key called redundantly on every instance/app request
description: File: src/api.rs:336, 849, 912, 1256. get_vapid_public_key is called on every request to create_app, instance_v1, instance_v2, and verify_app_credentials. Each call does a DB query and potentially generates a keypair. The VAPID public key is immutable once created. Should be loaded once at startup (into AppState) or cached behind a OnceLock to avoid repeated DB hits on high-traffic endpoints.
